title: More Powerful Gemstones
description: Adds 2 new dimensions with gemstones that give effects and can fuse with other gems to combine effects, plus a few other things.
body:
This mod adds 6 new ores! Ruby, Sapphire, Topaz, Pearl, and Amathyst ore. These ores combine with each other Ruby and Sapphire combine to make Garnet, Pearl and Amathyst make opal, and Topaz and the vanilla ore Lapis make Malachite. Then those 3 fuse and make the OP Gem which is an endgame material.


This mod also adds a new dimension called the light dimension which houses the light crystal ore the 6th ore in this mod it is used to make a multitude of things.



A few mobs are in this mod as well a knight, a wizard, and two different possessed sets of armor.


The next version 2.0 will be released shortly in which are many changes so I hope everyone who downloads this mod has fun!

The mod is also available on Curse forge if anyone needs it from there
https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/op-gem-mod
